# Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis on AI, Creativity, and a Golden Age of Science | All-In Summit

[All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/all-in-with-chamath-jason-sacks-friedberg/id1502871393)

Play

(0:00) Introducing Sir Demis Hassabis, reflecting on his Nobel Prize win

(2:39) What is Google DeepMind? How does it interact with Google and Alphabet?

(4:01) Genie 3 world model

(9:21) State of robotics models, form factors, and more

(14:42) AI science breakthroughs, measuring AGI

(20:49) Nano-Banana and the future of creative tools, democratization of creativity

(24:44) Isomorphic Labs, probabilistic vs deterministic, scaling compute, a golden age of science

Thanks to our partners for making this happen!

IREN - IREN AI Cloud, powered by NVIDIA GPUs, provides the scale, performance, and reliability to accelerate your AI journey. https://iren.com/

Oracle - Step into the future of enterprise productivity at Oracle AI Experience Live. https://www.oracle.com/
